parameters.content:
## Salesforce to PDF Filler

**Setup:**
1. Start Python API: cd salesforce-pdf-filler && python run.py serve
2. Place PDF template in templates/ folder
3. Run python run.py discover templates/your.pdf to see field names
4. Edit the Code node mapping to match your PDF fields
5. Configure Salesforce credentials in n8n

**Two triggers:**
- Auto: Salesforce Trigger (on Lead create/update)
- Manual: Click Test workflow with a Lead ID

**API Endpoints:**
- POST /fill - Fill from Salesforce IDs
- POST /fill/raw - Fill from raw JSON
- GET /discover - List PDF fields
- GET /health - Health check

main.node: Merge SF Data to PDF Fields
